Catching up on SaH after the holidays. It’s dusty in here, @ssfcvictorylap. https://t.co/h9JE8D8w3u

And sleeping now. https://t.co/MvyVkaAvq7

Sleepy dog is sleepy. https://t.co/PfjSBP4WTH

26 Dec 2016

Jolly Boxing Day from my favorite Cubs fan, Jim Laxson. https://t.co/kB08yjIiC7

26 Dec 2016

Cubs win! The Cubs win the pennant.

25 Dec 2016

Drinking scotch with my father in law and (re-)watching the Cubs beat the Dodgers.

25 Dec 2016

One of my favorite photos of Mom. I caught her laughing at the T-shirt for Rob’s trap shooting club. https://t.co/dVC2edDBGA

25 Dec 2016

A merry Clifton Christmas. https://t.co/4fKELiyQ81

25 Dec 2016

Perfect snow falling at Mom and Dad’s. https://t.co/LkIySn9Uwl

23 Dec 2016

Juncoes, purple finches, turtle dove, downy woodpecker, red-headed woodpecker, red-tailed hawk, and four extremely fat squirrels. #wildlife

23 Dec 2016

Enjoying watching the snow and the birds feeding at Mom and Dad’s, then this huge hawk swooped in and perched. https://t.co/9czVYSFyLp

23 Dec 2016

One more state falls to the authoritarian GOP. Who’s next? Or do the rest of us fall together? https://t.co/9e5N7pN3ou

23 Dec 2016

They’re giving the stuff away. https://t.co/mg8XftrQlP

22 Dec 2016

One of my favorite things about the Midwest: Culver’s fries /cc @fet https://t.co/PwtiTvLKaN

22 Dec 2016

Hello, Twin Cities.

22 Dec 2016

On board: SEA ✈️ MSP. First glass of wine in hand.

22 Dec 2016

Through security. Watching the sunset and waiting to board.

21 Dec 2016

Looks like they’re going to swap my MBP for a new one. 👍🏻

21 Dec 2016

Headed to the Apple Store on Dec. 21. If I don’t make it back, speak well of me.
